attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.VENDOR_EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.VENDOR_COMPANY_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.WEEKLY_RATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.SOW_CURRENCY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.SEQ_NUM, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES,
 (
 select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES
 minus
 select OGG_KEY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_VENDOR_RATES)
